## Connecting Me to Google Sheets

**What I need:**
- A Google Cloud service account + JSON key
- The sheet shared with that service account email

**What you'd do:**
1. Go to [console.cloud.google.com](https://console.cloud.google.com) → IAM → Service Accounts → create one
2. Generate a JSON key → paste it into a file I can access
3. Share your Sheet with the service account email (looks like `your-service@project.iam.gserviceaccount.com`)
...
